title: Cinematic Portrait Generator
promptText: A cinematic portrait of [SUBJECT_DESCRIPTION], shot on a 85mm lens with shallow depth of field. [LIGHTING_STYLE] lighting creating dramatic shadows across the face. The subject is positioned using the rule of thirds against a [BACKGROUND] background. Color grading inspired by [FILM_REFERENCE] with [COLOR_PALETTE] tones. Film grain texture, 8K resolution, photorealistic. The expression conveys [EMOTION]. Shot from a [CAMERA_ANGLE] angle.
description: This image generation prompt creates stunning cinematic portraits that look like stills from high-budget films. By specifying lens focal length, lighting style, and color grading references, you get images with a consistent professional quality that goes far beyond basic AI headshots. The film reference parameter is particularly powerful because it gives the AI a visual shorthand for complex color and mood combinations. Use it for concept art, character design, social media content, or visualizing characters for fiction projects.

variables.name: SUBJECT_DESCRIPTION
variables.description: Who or what the portrait depicts
variables.example: a weathered sea captain in his 60s with salt-and-pepper beard

variables.name: FILM_REFERENCE
variables.description: A film whose visual style to emulate

variables.name: EMOTION
variables.description: The feeling in the subject's expression

tips: Combine film references with specific color palettes for unique looks
Add '--ar 2:3' for vertical portrait aspect ratios in Midjourney
Try 'Kodak Portra 400' or 'Fujifilm Pro 400H' as film stock references for different color science
exampleOutput: A photorealistic cinematic portrait of a weathered sea captain with deep-set eyes and salt-and-pepper beard, Rembrandt lighting casting dramatic shadows across his face. Foggy harbor at dawn behind him, soft bokeh. Blade Runner 2049 color grading with desaturated teal and amber tones. His expression conveys quiet determination. Slight film grain, 8K detail.
metaDescription: Create stunning cinematic portrait images with film-quality lighting and color grading. Try this Midjourney prompt for photorealistic results.
